canonical_definition: Large-scale dataset focusing on individuals' stances toward U.S. political figures (Trump, Biden, Sanders) with binary labels (favor or against), used to evaluate performance in real-world political discourse.
papers: How Do Social Bots Participate in Misinformation Spread? A Comprehensive Dataset and Analysis
Mixture of Length and Pruning Experts for Knowledge Graphs Reasoning

relationships.paper: Mixture of Length and Pruning Experts for Knowledge Graphs Reasoning
relationships.evidence: Extensive experiments on the SEM16, VAST, and PStance datasets demonstrate that MPRF outperforms existing models.
